top_signals.title: A Fresh Look at the Houthi Threat to Maritime Shipping
top_signals.summary:
In 2024, Allison Minor wrote, “Solving the Houthi Threat to Freedom of Navigation,” where she argued the international response to Houthi attacks on shipping in the Red Sea has so far been inadequate and proposed a U.N.-led solution. Two years later, with global attention once again focused on maritime shipping activity, we asked Allison to review her arguments. Image: Petty Officer 1st Class Jonathan Word via DVIDSWhen you wrote about the Houthi threat in 2024, the activities in the Red Sea commanded high global attention. Two years on, that attention has largely shifted to the Strait of Hormuz. What has been

The post A Fresh Look at the Houthi Threat to Maritime Shipping appeared first on War on the Rocks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Mutual Fund Managers Missing 'Biblical' Opportunity: Smead
top_signals.summary: Cole Smead, CEO of Smead Capital, joins Katie Greifeld, Scarlet Fu, and Eric Balchunas on "Bloomberg ETF IQ." Smead outlines the benefits of mutual funds and how they can match ETF tax efficiency.  (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Minutes of the UK Money Markets Code Sub-Committee – June 2026
top_signals.summary: The Money Markets Committee is a forum for market participants and authorities to discuss the UK unsecured deposits and funding market and securities lending and repo markets.

top_signals.title: Robinhood Chain draws over $3 billion in weekly DEX volume to join top five chains: Bernstein
top_signals.summary: Robinhood Chain hit $3.1B in weekly DEX volume and 65K users since its July 1 launch, as the Layer 2 eyes tokenized markets, Bernstein said.
